innovations.meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruc: Integrate a feedback loop between Yusif and Claude to ensure that the CEO's creative input is balanced with the CTO's technical expertise.
innovations.llama-3.3-70b-versatile: Implement a ' mistake of the week' review process to incentivize Claude to improve protocol compliance and reduce mistakes.
innovations.openai/gpt-oss-120b: Run a one‑session "AI stand‑up" where Claude auto‑generates a 200‑word status summary and risk flag list; Yusif reviews only that, eliminating multi‑topic messages and reducing context‑switch overhead.
innovations.gemini-flash-lite-latest: Implement a mandatory 'Swarm Gate' step after every Claude output: Claude must prompt the MiroFish swarm to audit its own output against the session goal *before* presenting it to Yusif. This forces internal validation.
innovations.moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct-0905: Give the swarm a 30-second ‘pre-commit hook’: every Claude code block is sent to three cheapest swarm models in parallel for a lightning security/validation vote; reject if <2 approve. One-session implementation, zero workflow change.
innovations.moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct: Spin up a ‘red-team’ agent persona inside the swarm that gets rewarded for every vuln it sneaks past the others; publish its success rate daily to keep the swarm honest.
